lead.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式VR在亚急性卒中上肢康复中的应用：一项RCT
lead.titleEn: Smartphone Semi-Immersive VR for Upper Extremity Rehab in Subacute Stroke: An RCT
lead.paragraphZh: 今日共 5 条更新，主要集中在神经康复领域。其中，得分最高的 RCT 探讨了智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术在亚急性卒中患者上肢功能恢复中的作用，提供了 85 分的证据。另有一项 80 分的系统综述，关注物理治疗技术在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's updates include 5 items, predominantly in neurological rehabilitation. The top-scoring RCT, with a curated score of 85, examines smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality for upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients. Additionally, an 80-score systematic review focuses on the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in managing endometriosis symptoms.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial (n=40) demonstrates that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality, when added to conventional physical therapy, significantly enhances upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients (p<0.001, Cohen's d=1.2).
items.curatedReason: 智能手机虚拟现实结合常规物理治疗显著改善亚急性卒中患者上肢功能。这为你提供了一个低成本、易于实施的工具，可以考虑纳入临床实践，尤其是在资源有限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术增强亚急性卒中患者上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=40）结果显示，智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）技术结合常规物理治疗，能显著改善亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能（p<0.001, Cohen's d=1.2）。
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（n=40），且随访期有限，长期效果仍需进一步证实。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size (n=40) and limited follow-up, so long-term effects require further confirmation.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort study examined the association between postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: Mini-BESTest 能有效预测慢性硬膜下血肿术后患者的住院时间。在制定出院计划时，可将其作为评估平衡功能和预测预后的一个工具。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列研究旨在探讨慢性硬膜下血肿（CSDH）患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) 评分与住院时间（LOS）之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mini-BESTest effectively predicts length of hospital stay in patients after chronic subdural hematoma surgery. You can use it as a tool to assess balance function and predict prognosis when planning discharge.
items.limitation: 研究为单中心前瞻性队列研究，结果可能受地域和医院特定因素影响。
items.limitationEn: The study is a single-center prospective cohort study, and results may be influenced by geographic and hospital-specific factors.

items.title: From rehabilitation to performance: reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimise sports performance.
items.summary: This article discusses reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimize sports performance, moving beyond traditional rehabilitation contexts.
items.curatedReason: 将前庭-眼动干预从传统康复范畴扩展至运动表现优化，提供了新的视角。这提示你，在评估和训练运动员时，可以考虑整合这些技术以提升运动表现和减少伤害风险。
items.titleZh: 从康复到表现：重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现，超越了传统的康复语境。
items.curatedReasonEn: Reframing vestibular-ocular interventions from traditional rehabilitation to sports performance optimization offers a new perspective. This suggests that when assessing and training athletes, you can consider integrating these techniques to enhance athletic performance and reduce injury risk.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors identified a high prevalence of knee pain and associated factors, suggesting gait alterations after stroke may lead to knee pain.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后步态异常导致的膝痛在慢性卒中幸存者中很常见。评估膝痛并将其纳入康复计划，有助于改善患者生活质量和依从性。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中步行幸存者膝痛患病率及其影响因素
items.summaryZh: 这项对 212 名慢性卒中步行幸存者的横断面研究发现膝痛患病率较高，并识别了相关影响因素，提示卒中后步态改变可能导致膝痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee pain due to gait alterations after stroke is common among chronic stroke survivors. Assessing and integrating knee pain into rehabilitation plans can improve patient quality of life and adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，只能揭示相关性，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study can only show correlation, not causation.

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different physical therapy methods and techniques in improving symptoms triggered by endometriosis.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了物理治疗技术在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性。在临床实践中，你可以依据这些证据，考虑将特定的物理治疗干预整合到子宫内膜异位症患者的综合治疗方案中。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析评估了不同物理治疗方法和技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in managing endometriosis symptoms. In clinical practice, you can consider integrating specific physical therapy interventions into comprehensive treatment plans for endometriosis patients based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量存在差异，且许多研究样本量较小，可能影响结果的综合强度。
items.limitationEn: Variations in methodological quality and small sample sizes in many included studies may affect the overall strength of the results.
